summary.en: The mandatory obligation is supply compliance under the GEMS Act 2012 and the Household Refrigerating Appliances Determination 2019. Covered refrigerator and freezer models must be registered with the GEMS Regulator before they are supplied in Australia, and Energy Rating Label requirements apply when supplying or offering to supply covered products at retail. The label must display the star rating and estimated annual energy consumption, and the Determination and AS/NZS 4474:2018 specify label content, format, and display rules.
summary.zh: 强制性义务是依据《GEMS法2012》及《家用制冷器具决定2019》满足供应合规。覆盖范围内的电冰箱和冷冻箱型号在澳大利亚供应前须向GEMS监管机构注册；在零售供应或要约供应时适用能效标签要求。标签须显示星级和预计年耗电量，标签内容、格式和展示规则由该决定及AS/NZS 4474:2018规定。
summary.zht: 強制性義務是依據《GEMS法2012》及《家用製冷器具決定2019》滿足供應合規。覆蓋範圍內的電冰箱和冷凍箱型號在澳洲供應前須向GEMS監管機構登記；在零售供應或要約供應時適用能效標籤要求。標籤須顯示星級和預計年耗電量，標籤內容、格式和展示規則由該決定及AS/NZS 4474:2018規定。

standards_or_laws: Greenhouse and Energy Minimum Standards Act 2012 — mandatory registration and supply framework
Greenhouse and Energy Minimum Standards (Household Refrigerating Appliances) Determination 2019 — mandatory registration, labelling, MEPS, and product performance framework
AS/NZS 4474:2018 — referenced label and MEPS requirements standard
Energy Rating Product Registration system — GEMS product registration portal

summary.en: China uses the China Energy Label for domestic refrigerator sales, based on GB 12021.2 energy grades. The Chinese label is a domestic consumer information and energy efficiency compliance tool. It is not the Australian Energy Rating Label, and China domestic registration or label filing does not create a GEMS registration.
summary.zh: 中国境内电冰箱销售使用中国能效标识，并以GB 12021.2能效等级为基础。中国标签是境内消费者信息和能效合规工具，并非澳大利亚能效标签；中国境内注册或标签备案不会形成GEMS注册。
summary.zht: 中國境內電冰箱銷售使用中國能效標識，並以GB 12021.2能效等級為基礎。中國標籤是境內消費者資訊和能效合規工具，並非澳洲能效標籤；中國境內登記或標籤備案不會形成GEMS登記。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — China refrigerator energy efficiency grade standard
China Energy Label system — China domestic energy label

gap.en: Australia requires a GEMS registration record and Australian Energy Rating Label evidence before supply. The Chinese CEL artwork, annual consumption value, and grade cannot be reused as the Australian label without recalculation and formatting to AS/NZS 4474/GEMS rules. Retail display obligations also apply to packaging, in-store display, and online listings as specified by the Australian framework.
gap.zh: 澳大利亚要求供应前具备GEMS注册记录和澳大利亚能效标签证据。中国能效标识图稿、年耗电量和等级未经按AS/NZS 4474/GEMS规则重新计算和排版，不能作为澳大利亚标签使用。澳大利亚框架还对包装、门店展示和线上列表规定零售展示义务。
gap.zht: 澳洲要求供應前具備GEMS登記記錄和澳洲能效標籤證據。中國能效標識圖稿、年耗電量和等級未經按AS/NZS 4474/GEMS規則重新計算和排版，不能作為澳洲標籤使用。澳洲框架還對包裝、門店展示和線上列表規定零售展示義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — GEMS registration and Energy Rating Label obligations apply under the GEMS Act 2012 and Household Refrigerating Appliances Determination 2019 before supply or retail offering in Australia
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label obligations apply to covered models before sale in China

source.publisher: Energy Rating / Australian Government E3 Program

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GEMS registration and the Australian Energy Rating Label are separate hard gates from China Energy Label compliance. A covered refrigerator model cannot be treated as ready for Australian supply until the GEMS record and label evidence are complete.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】GEMS注册和澳大利亚能效标签是独立于中国能效标识的强制门槛。覆盖范围内的电冰箱型号在GEMS记录和标签证据完成前，不应视为已可在澳大利亚供应。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】GEMS登記和澳洲能效標籤是獨立於中國能效標識的強制門檻。覆蓋範圍內的電冰箱型號在GEMS記錄和標籤證據完成前，不應視為已可在澳洲供應。
